creator: swills@FreeBSD.org
text:
Awesome, this looks really great! I'm going to build test this and commit ASAP.

Thanks!
Steve

On Mon, Mar 17, 2014 at 08:21:46AM -0700, Joseph Benden wrote:
> Steve Wills wrote:
> > Since RUBY_VER=2.1, does this mean the port only works with Ruby 2.1?
> 
> The latest version, 1.5.1, only works with newer rubies.
> 
> >
> > Also, why not use USE_RUBYGEMS=yes and RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=yes? 
> 
> Well, up until a day ago, RubyGems wasn't updated to any recent release.
> I had to build the gem from source. Now an older 1.5.0 version is
> available on RubyGems. Please find the attached patch that uses
> USE_RUBYGEMS=yes and RUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=yes. This is a point release
> behind what's available, though. So we could use the original method I
> have in the Makefile to build it from source.
> 
> > Finally, are you
> > sure emulators is the right category for this? Perhaps sysutils would be
> > better?
> 
> I switched it to sysutils. I had it under emulators because it's a tool
> that works with emulators...
> 
> 

> # This is a shell archive.  Save it in a file, remove anything before
> # this line, and then unpack it by entering "sh file".  Note, it may
> # create directories; files and directories will be owned by you and
> # have default permissions.
> #
> # This archive contains:
> #
> #	sysutils/vagrant
> #	sysutils/vagrant/Makefile
> #	sysutils/vagrant/pkg-descr
> #	sysutils/vagrant/distinfo
> #
> echo c - sysutils/vagrant
> mkdir -p sysutils/vagrant > /dev/null 2>&1
> echo x - sysutils/vagrant/Makefile
> sed 's/^X//' >sysutils/vagrant/Makefile << '95d3f36f1c11afb09098727693325980'
> X# Created by: Joseph Benden <joe@thrallingpenguin.com>
> X# $FreeBSD$
> X
> XPORTNAME=	vagrant
> XPORTVERSION=	1.5.0
> XCATEGORIES=	sysutils rubygems devel
> XMASTER_SITES=	RG
> X
> XMAINTAINER=	joe@thrallingpenguin.com
> XCOMMENT=	Vagrant the Virtual Machine Manager
> X
> XLICENSE=	MIT
> X
> XBUILD_DEPENDS=  rubygem-bundler>=1.5.3:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/rubygem-bundler \
> X		rubygem-main>=1.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-main
> XRUN_DEPENDS=	rubygem-main>=1.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-main \
> X		rubygem-bundler>=1.5.3:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/rubygem-bundler \
> X		rubygem-ffi>=1.9.3:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-ffi \
> X		rubygem-childprocess>=0.5.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-childprocess \
> X		rubygem-erubis>=2.7.0:${PORTSDIR}/www/rubygem-erubis \
> X		rubygem-i18n>=0.6.9:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-i18n \
> X		rubygem-timers>=1.1.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-timers \
> X		rubygem-celluloid>=0.15.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-celluloid \
> X		rubygem-rb-fsevent>=0.9.4:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-rb-fsevent \
> X		rubygem-rb-inotify>=0.9.3:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-rb-inotify \
> X		rubygem-listen>=2.4.1:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-listen \
> X		rubygem-log4r>=1.1.10:${PORTSDIR}/sysutils/rubygem-log4r \
> X		rubygem-net-ssh>=2.7.0:${PORTSDIR}/security/rubygem-net-ssh \
> X		rubygem-net-scp>=1.1.2:${PORTSDIR}/security/rubygem-net-scp \
> X		rubygem-rb-kqueue>=0.2.2:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-rb-kqueue \
> X		rubygem-wdm>=0.1.0:${PORTSDIR}/devel/rubygem-wdm
> X
> XUSE_RUBY=		yes
> XUSE_RUBYGEMS=		yes
> XRUBYGEM_AUTOPLIST=	yes
> X
> X.include <bsd.port.mk>
> 95d3f36f1c11afb09098727693325980
> echo x - sysutils/vagrant/pkg-descr
> sed 's/^X//' >sysutils/vagrant/pkg-descr << '8b55972a235f702afc5c7e2e245a2c88'
> XVagrant is a tool for building and distributing virtualized development
> Xenvironments.
> X
> XWWW: http://www.vagrantup.com/
> 8b55972a235f702afc5c7e2e245a2c88
> echo x - sysutils/vagrant/distinfo
> sed 's/^X//' >sysutils/vagrant/distinfo << '235dc049d4c7080673cd94001a0de4ef'
> XSHA256 (rubygem/vagrant-1.5.0.gem) = 3d030bdddabbe3fc3708155344349f860e16de97b6dd5afb9fc1f0cbb399f276
> XSIZE (rubygem/vagrant-1.5.0.gem) = 6144
> 235dc049d4c7080673cd94001a0de4ef
> exit
>
